description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request. The workflow should have a concurrency group based on the workflow and head reference, cancelling any in-progress jobs. It should have three jobs: Ubuntu, VisualStudio, and MacOS, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest). For each job, check out the repository, install meson and ninja using pip, and then perform meson setup and compile steps with different dependency configurations.
